layout_spacing.philosophy: Strict grid hierarchy, dense and compact. 'Control Room' grid.

ui_components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), no shadow. On hover: slightly darken border, no vertical lift.
ui_components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none). Primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:ring-offset-2. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50.
ui_components.inputs: Flat, 1px border border-slate-300, rounded-none. focus:ring-1 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-slate-900
ui_components.badges: Square corners (rounded-none), text-xs uppercase tracking-wider, border-none.
ui_components.progress_bar: Flat rectangle (rounded-none). Color maps to overall risk.
ui_components.document_viewer: Split pane design. Left side holds the document with generous line height and max-w-prose for readability. Right side holds the interactive analysis and risk scoring.

motion.entrance: Subtle fade-in for document parsing (opacity 0 to 1).
motion.interactions: Highlighting risky clauses on hover in the document viewer syncs with highlighting the corresponding sidebar card.

image_urls.description: Magnifying glass focusing on terms and conditions. Excellent for empty state or welcome screen.
Abstract architecture, good for an auth split screen or high-end dashboard accent.
High-tech abstract pattern for AI parsing state or loading overlay.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against colored risk backgrounds meets 4.5:1 minimum.
accessibility.focus_states: 2px solid slate-900 outline offset by 2px on interactive elements.
accessibility.test_attributes: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a split-pane dashboard for the document analysis. Left pane: The raw document with highlighted clauses. Right pane: The Risk Score, Entity List, and Risk Cards.
Use Phosphor icons for a technical, precise feel (run `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`).
Do not use rounded corners (use `rounded-none`). This is a serious legal app; it should feel like paper and precision instruments.
Risk score progress bar should be a segmented flat line or a sharp gauge, avoiding soft rounded progress tracks.
Use Shadcn UI components but override border radii to `rounded-none` and remove default shadows.
Ensure clause highlights in the document pane use the exact bg colors from `colors.status` to match the sidebar cards.
Highlight words or entities using `<mark>` tags or custom inline spans styled with `bg-blue-50 text-blue-700`.
